forbidden_patterns: shadow-* Tailwind shadows (nur CSS box-shadow offset style)
smooth easing (ease-in-out verboten — nur linear oder keine)
font-sans als Heading (nur font-mono oder font-display/grotesque)
required_patterns: border-4 oder border-8 auf jedem Card und CTA-Element
offset box-shadow: style='box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 var(--color-text)' auf Cards und Buttons
hover shrinks shadow: hover:translate-x-1 hover:translate-y-1 + shadow shrinks to 2px 2px 0
ALL CAPS für alle Überschriften (uppercase class)
stark kontrastreiche Sektionen: schwarz auf weiß oder weiß auf schwarz

html_patterns.section_wrapper: <section class="relative py-12 md:py-16 border-b-4" style="border-color: var(--color-text)">
html_patterns.eyebrow: // LABEL
html_patterns.hero_h1: <h1 class="font-mono font-black uppercase leading-none tracking-tight" style="font-size: clamp(3rem, 12vw, 10rem); line-height: 0.9">
html_patterns.cta_primary: <a href="#" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border-4 transition-transform duration-75 hover:translate-x-1 hover:translate-y-1" style="border-color: var(--color-text); background-color: var(--color-accent); color: #fff; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 var(--color-text)">
html_patterns.cta_secondary: <a href="#" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border-4 transition-transform duration-75 hover:translate-x-1 hover:translate-y-1" style="border-color: var(--color-text); background-color: transparent; color: var(--color-text); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 var(--color-text)">
html_patterns.cta_ghost: <a href="#" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border-2 transition-transform duration-75 hover:translate-x-0.5 hover:translate-y-0.5" style="border-color: var(--color-text-muted); color: var(--color-text-muted); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 var(--color-text-muted)">
html_patterns.dark_section: <section class="relative py-12 md:py-16 border-b-4" style="background-color: var(--color-dark); border-color: var(--color-accent)">
html_patterns.stat_number: <div class="font-mono font-black uppercase leading-none" style="font-size: clamp(2.5rem,8vw,7rem); color: var(--color-accent)">
html_patterns.card: <div class="border-4 p-6 relative" style="border-color: var(--color-text); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 var(--color-text); background-color: var(--color-background)">
